expectations.text: Runs clams login or checks clams status as the first step
expectations.evidence: Step 1 runs `clams status --machine --format json` to check auth, then Step 2 runs `clams login` if not authenticated.

expectations.text: Runs clams workspaces create with a label
Runs clams profiles create with workspace ID
Runs clams context set to set the default profile
expectations.evidence: Step 5: `clams context set --profile Personal --machine --format json` followed by `clams context current` to verify.

expectations.text: Runs clams onchain create with --kind Electrum and the user's server URL
expectations.evidence: Step 7: `clams onchain create --label electrum-blockstream --kind Electrum --url ssl://electrum.blockstream.info:50002 --select --machine --format json`

expectations.text: Runs clams connections create --kind XPub with the user's xpub
Runs clams connections sync after creating the connection
Runs clams journals process after syncing
expectations.evidence: Step 11: `clams journals process --machine --format json` with note: 'Skipping this step is the #1 cause of empty reports.'

expectations.text: Runs clams reports balance-sheet to show the user their balance
Commands that need parsed output use --machine --format json
expectations.evidence: All programmatic commands (status, workspaces create, profiles create, context set, onchain create, connections create, connections sync, journals process, journals quarantined) use --machine --format json. Display commands (balance-sheet, portfolio-summary) correctly use --format plain.

eval_feedback.overall: Clean pass. The with-skill run also adds profile configuration (fiat currency, gains algorithm), rate syncing, quarantine check, and a verify-state.sh run — all valuable steps that no assertion currently tests.
